role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within domain constraints.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues as declared.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (mango, coconut) and their regional distribution.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road construction (slabs, joints) and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (motorcycles, poles) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the Philippines. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence (road slabs, mango trees, underbone motorcycles) that strongly supported the truth. The tournament logic was sound, correctly prioritizing the Philippines over the closest competitor (Vietnam) based on specific infrastructure and botanical markers.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of palms, concrete walls, and road slabs match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Mango and coconut identification is visually supported.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road slab and joint descriptions are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Motorcycle and pole descriptions are accurate.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the Philippines.
